license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5y3g7yn
title: Reviving dead dry-erase markers
author: Scott Barolo

steps_raw.instruction: Tape a string to the back of the dry-erase marker as shown below.
Spin the marker like a lasso above your head, about 25 times. (See the video here: https://www.facebook.com/sandy.owens.54/videos/10214113211493293/ .)
There should now be more life in the marker.
